<p class="key-answer" data-question="Alectinib Hydrochloride 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Alectinib Hydrochloride</strong> 目前有 <strong>15 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Alectinib Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Adjuvant treatment of resected non small cell lung cancer (NSCLC)&nbsp;Alecensa as monotherapy is indicated as adjuvant treatment following complete tumour resection for adult patients with ALK...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（100.0%）</li>
<li>fibroma of lung（100.0%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（100.0%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary sulcus neoplasm（100.0%）</li>
<li>lung germ cell tumor（100.0%）</li>
<li>Leukomelanoderma-infantilism-intellectual disability-hypodontia-hypotrichosis syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（100.0%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa（100.0%）</li>
<li>lung cancer（99.9%）</li>
<li>ovarioleukodystrophy（99.9%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa, non-Herlitz type（99.9%）</li>
<li>dehydratase deficiency（99.9%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>synovial chondromatosis（99.0%）</li>
<li>orbit sarcoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>giant cell tumor of soft tissue（98.9%）</li>
<li>sarcoma, avian（98.9%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（98.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
